name: Sweet & Sour Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Can, French style green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, fry bacon until crisp. Remove and drain.
2. Crumble the bacon.
3. Add onion and water chestnuts to bacon drippings and sauté until onion is golden brown, stirring frequently.
4. Drain green beans and reserve ½ cup liquid from cooking them.
5. Combine the bean liquid, cornstarch, salt, mustard, brown sugar, and vinegar in a bowl. Stir until smooth.
6. Add the mixture to the skillet with bacon, onion, and water chestnuts. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
7. Add green beans and pimento. Heat through.
8. Serve garnished with crumbled bacon.
